description: Upscale cocktail lounge in Kigali City Tower with premium spirits, fine bites, and city skyline views

description: Modern African kitchen and cocktail bar in Westlands

description: Premium IMAX screenings at Garden City Mall cinema

description: Indoor laser tag battles and VR gaming at Village Market

description: Visit the world-famous baby elephant orphanage at Nairobi National Park for the daily 11 AM feeding hour
